title: SpliceosomeAtlas: Pan-cancer alteration landscape of the core spliceosome machinery
description: Curated copy-number-alteration and somatic-mutation frequency tables for 15 core spliceosome machinery genes across 32 TCGA PanCancer Atlas tumour types (n = 10,195 samples), retrieved via the cBioPortal public API (v7.0.0, June 2026), with a reproducible Python retrieval pipeline and an R figure-generation script. Data files CC BY 4.0; code MIT.
